name: io.github.pocharlies/qdrant-rag
title: Qdrant RAG Server
description: E-commerce RAG platform powered by Qdrant hybrid search. Provides product catalog search (Shopify), web crawling & indexing, competitor intelligence with price comparison, multi-language translation, and LLM chat with RAG context.

environmentVariables.name: POCHARLIES_RAG_URL
environmentVariables.description: Backend RAG service URL (Flask/Uvicorn) that handles crawling, classification, translation, and product sync

environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: HuggingFace embedding model for dense vectors (default: BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5)

environmentVariables.name: LLM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM API base URL (used by the backend for classification, translation, and chat)

environmentVariables.name: LLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the LLM service

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_SHOP_DOMAIN
environmentVariables.description: Shopify store domain (e.g., mystore.myshopify.com) for product catalog sync

environmentVariables.name: SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Shopify Admin API access token for product catalog sync

environmentVariables.name: RERANKER_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Cross-encoder reranker model for search quality (default: BAAI/bge-reranker-v2-m3)
